productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Navy Blue Shirt
description: Composition Navy blue and brown striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has half sleeves, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, pocket on the left chest, and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Chuck that boredom out of your life, slip into this striped casual shirt from the Oddies collection of peter england and express your ordinary in style. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this shirt offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Add on denims and sneakers, and conquer the world in style.
